urlEntries.comment: Static core-js license metadata emitted once in the PDF.js main bundle and once in its worker; never used as a request target.
Static core-js source metadata emitted once in the PDF.js main bundle and once in its worker; never used as a request target.
Static core-js URL/URLSearchParams conformance-test input emitted in both PDF.js bundles; it is passed only to URL constructors.
Static expected value in the core-js URL conformance test emitted in both PDF.js bundles; it is only compared as text.
Static core-js URL parser conformance-test input emitted in both PDF.js bundles; it is passed only to the URL constructor.
Static core-js internationalized-host parser test emitted in both PDF.js bundles; it is passed only to the URL constructor.
Static core-js Unicode-fragment parser test emitted in both PDF.js bundles; it is passed only to the URL constructor.
Static core-js URL parser conformance-test input emitted in both PDF.js bundles; it is passed only to the URL constructor.
SVG XML namespace constant emitted once in the PDF.js main bundle and once in its worker; it is not a retrievable resource.
Exact minified main-bundle template used to add a default protocol while normalizing a PDF link; it constructs a URL value but performs no request.
Exact minified worker-bundle template used to add a default protocol while normalizing a PDF link; it constructs a URL value but performs no request.
Static base URL used only to validate and normalize a relative PDF link in the PDF.js main bundle.
Static fallback base passed to URL parsing twice by PDF.js filename extraction; no request is performed.
Apache-2.0 license notice in the PDF.js worker header comment; never used at runtime.
XFA configuration XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
XFA connection-set XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
XFA data XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
XFA form XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
XFA locale-set XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
Adobe XDP PDF XML namespace identifier used for string comparison only.
XML signature namespace identifier used for string comparison only.
XFA source-set XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
XSLT XML namespace identifier used for string comparison only.
XFA template XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
XFA XDC XML namespace identifier used for string matching only.
Adobe XDP XML namespace identifier used for string comparison only.
Adobe XFDF XML namespace identifier used for string comparison only.
XHTML XML namespace identifier used for string comparison only.
Adobe XMP metadata XML namespace identifier used for string comparison only.
XFA datasets serialization namespace emitted into XML text; it is not fetched.

networkApiTokens.comment: Exact population: 2 pre-existing occurrences (Vite's same-package modulepreload call and Alice prose); PDF.js main adds 2 unreachable global fetch calls plus 2 member names/calls; its worker adds 1 unreachable global fetch call, 29 internal PDF object-table fetch methods/calls, and 5 diagnostic strings. URL document loading is unreachable because G2 Reader passes only ArrayBuffer data. disableFontFace stops browser font installation; CMap and font-data requests fail at their null base URLs before fetch, and worker fetching is explicitly false.

Exact population: PDF.js main has one binary-resource constructor, its DONE constant, and one URL-document network-stream constructor; the worker has one synchronous ICC/WASM constructor. ArrayBuffer-only document loading bypasses the URL stream, absent resource base URLs prevent binary loads, and useWorkerFetch:false disables the worker ICC/WASM path.
This is the Even Hub SDK's protobuf field-name string for input eventSource, not construction or use of the browser EventSource network API.
